nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ernulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ernulf de Morewick was born in 1125, in Chevington Chapelry, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Fitzeudo de Morwick I, was 30 and his mother, Mrs Hugh FritzEudo De Morwick, was 30. He had at least 1 son with Mrs Emulf De Morwick. He died in 1177, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ernulf de Morewick est né en 1125, à Chevington Chapelry, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Fitzeudo de Morwick I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs Hugh FritzEudo De Morwick, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs Emulf De Morwick. Il est décédé en 1177, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Ernulf de Morewick(이)가 1125년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 처빙턴 차플리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Fitzeudo de Morwick I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Hugh FritzEudo De Morwick(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Mrs Emulf De Morwick(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1177년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.
